---
name: Bug or wrong guidance
about: Report an SEO recommendation that's wrong, outdated, or misleading
title: '[bug] '
labels: bug
---

**Where in the skill is the issue?**
File path + line, e.g. `core/technical-seo.md:34`.

**What does it currently say?**
Quote the text.

**Why is it wrong / what's the correct guidance?**
Cite a primary source if possible (Google docs, Search Central blog, a study, a tested case).

**Which AI tool were you using when this came up?**
Claude / ChatGPT / Gemini / Perplexity / Cursor / etc.

**Any extra context?**
Screenshots, search-console exports, etc. (Do not share secrets or client URLs you don't have permission to disclose.)
